zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Pennington I於大約1393年出生在英國藍卡爾彭寧頓時，他的父親Sir Alan Pennington35歲，母親Katherine Preston23歲。他於1412年4月28日與Katherine Tunstall在英國藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他於1458年被列為commissioner in cumberland to raife archers (by act of parl.)。他去世於1470年7月6日在英國波藍德蒙卡斯特享年78歲，埋葬在英國波藍德蒙卡斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Pennington I于大约1393年出生在英国藍卡爾彭寧頓时，他的父亲Sir Alan Pennington35岁，母亲Katherine Preston23岁。他于1412年4月28日与Katherine Tunstall在英国藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1415年登记服兵役。他于1458年被列为commissioner in cumberland to raife archers (by act of parl.)。他去世于1470年7月6日在英国波藍德蒙卡斯特享年78岁，埋葬在英国波藍德蒙卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Pennington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Pennington in Furness (Lancashire), which derives from Old English pening ‘penny’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, or from Pennington in Leigh (Lancashire), which probably derives from the Old English personal name Pinna + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + Old English tūn.
habitational name from Pennington (Hampshire), or from Penton Grafton or Penton Mewsey (both Hampshire); see   Penton  . All have the same etymology as Pennington in Furness; see 1 above.

variants.name: Penington
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Pennington  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.
History: Edward Penington, born in 1667 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, was appointed surveyor-general of the province of PA in 1698 and accompanied William Penn to Philadelphia.

variants.name: Penton
meanings: habitational name from Penton Grafton or Penton Mewsey (both Hanmpshire), or from a shortened form of Pennington 2. The placenames denoted a farm or estate for which a penny tax was payable (Old English pening ‘penny’ + tūn).
in north-west England, a shortened form of   Pennington   1, from either of the places called Pennington in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Pennington I was born about 1393, in Pennington, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Alan Pennington, was 35 and his mother, Katherine Preston, was 23. He married Katherine Tunstall on 28 April 1412, in Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1415. In 1458, at the age of 66, his occupation is listed as commissioner in cumberland to raife archers (by act of parl.). He died on 6 July 1470, in Muncaster, Cumberland, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Muncaster, Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Pennington I est né environ 1393, à Pennington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alan Pennington, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Katherine Preston, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Tunstall le 28 avril 1412, à Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. En 1458, à l’âge de 66 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est commissioner in cumberland to raife archers (by act of parl.). Il est décédé le 6 juillet 1470, à Muncaster, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Muncaster, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Pennington I um 1393 in Pennington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alan Pennington 35 und seine Mutter Katherine Preston 23. Er hat am 28. April 1412 in Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England Katherine Tunstall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1458, als er 66 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als commissioner in cumberland to raife archers (by act of parl.) aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. Juli 1470 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Muncaster, Cumberland, England und wurde in Muncaster, Cumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Pennington I è nato il circa 1393 nel Pennington, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Alan Pennington, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Preston, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Tunstall il 28 aprile 1412, nel Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Nel 1458, all'età di 66 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come commissioner in cumberland to raife archers (by act of parl.). Morì il 6 luglio 1470, nel Muncaster, Cumberland, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Muncaster, Cumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Pennington Iが約1393年にイギリスランカシュアイアペニントンで生まれた時，父Sir Alan Penningtonは35歳，母Katherine Prestonは23歳であった。1412年4月28日にイギリスランカシュアイアスウルランド カストルでKatherine Tunstallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。1458年，66歳の時，職業はcommissioner in cumberland to raife archers (by act of parl.)と記録されている。彼は1470年7月6日にイギリスクウンバーランドムンカスターで78歳で死去し，イギリスクウンバーランドムンカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Pennington I(이)가 대략 1393년 영국 랭카실르 펜잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alan Pennington(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Preston(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1412년 4월 28일 영국 랭카실르 스를랜드 카스틀에서 Katherine Tunstall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1458년, 66세의 나이로 그의 직업은 commissioner in cumberland to raife archers (by act of parl.)이었다. 그는 1470년 7월 6일 영국 c벌랜드 먼카스터에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 c벌랜드 먼카스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Pennington I nasceu aproximadamente 1393, em Pennington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alan Pennington, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Preston, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Tunstall em 28 de abril de 1412, em Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Em 1458, com 66 anos, sua profissão aparece como commissioner in cumberland to raife archers (by act of parl.). Ele faleceu em 6 de julho de 1470, em Muncaster, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Muncaster, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Pennington I родился около 1393 г. в местности пеннингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Alan Pennington было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Preston, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Tunstall 28 апреля 1412 г. в местности турланд кастл, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1458 году, в возрасте 66 лет, работал по профессии commissioner in cumberland to raife archers (by act of parl.). Он умер 6 июля 1470 г. в местности мункастир, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности мункастир, кумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Pennington I nació aproximadamente 1393, en Pennington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alan Pennington, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Katherine Preston, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Katherine Tunstall el 28 de abril de 1412, en Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. En 1458, a la edad de 66 años, su ocupación registrada era commissioner in cumberland to raife archers (by act of parl.). Murió el 6 de julio de 1470, en Muncaster, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Muncaster, Cumberland, Inglaterra.
